scripts.setup:icons: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const copy=(s,d,n)=>{const src=path.resolve(__dirname,s);const dest=path.resolve(__dirname,d);if(!fs.existsSync(dest)&&fs.existsSync(src)){fs.cpSync(src,dest,{recursive:true});console.log(n+' icons copied successfully');}else if(fs.existsSync(dest)){console.log(n+' icons already present');}else{console.warn('Warning: '+n+' assets not found at',src);}};copy('../icons-aws/assets/Architecture-Service-Icons_07312025','public/assets/Architecture-Service-Icons_07312025','AWS');copy('../icons-gcp/assets/gcp-icons','public/assets/gcp-icons','GCP');copy('../icons-azure/assets/azure-icons','public/assets/azure-icons','Azure');"
